# Domain Vision Template

## Document Status
Draft / Proposed / Approved

## Domain Name

## Purpose
Describe the business purpose of the domain.

## Scope
Define the domain boundaries and what is in/out of scope.

## Business Context
Explain the business motivation and strategic importance.

## Outcomes
List the expected outcomes and success criteria.

## Stakeholders
Identify primary stakeholders and domain owners.

## Constraints
List constraints, compliance requirements, or dependencies.

## Glossary Terms
Reference terms from `docs/governance/glossary.md`.

## Related Governance Documents
- `docs/governance/architecture-constitution.md`
- `docs/governance/quality-gates.md`
- `docs/governance/documentation-standards.md`

## Notes
Add any additional notes or assumptions.
